code:
import io
import string
import list

let line1_opt = io.read_line()
let line2_opt = io.read_line()

let line1 = match line1_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match line2_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  "0"
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      nums = list.push(nums, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut remaining = nums
while remaining.len() > 0
  let max_val = match list.max(remaining)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  sorted = list.push(sorted, max_val)
  let idx = match list.index_of(remaining, max_val)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut new_remaining: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  while j < remaining.len()
    if j != idx
      match remaining.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        new_remaining = list.push(new_remaining, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  remaining = new_remaining
end

let take = if k < sorted.len()
  k
else
  sorted.len()
end

mut out = ""
mut p = 0
while p < take
  match sorted.get(p)
  when Some(v)
    if p == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  p = p + 1
end

println(out)
